import { useEffect, useState } from "react"; import "./styles.css" function Mainweatherpage() { let [cityinput, changeinput] = useState("") let [dataafterclick, changedata] = useState({}) function function1(e) { changeinput(e.target.value) } async function apicall() { try { let weatherdata = await fetch(`https://api.openweathermap.org/data/2.5/weather?q=${cityinput[0].toUpperCase() + cityinput.slice(1)}&appid=d782528f491fa0b8359a25fc07739daa&units=metric`) let updatedweather = await weatherdata.json() let alldata2 = {maindata: updatedweather.main, city: updatedweather.name, weathertype: updatedweather.weather[0]} let arrback = await fetch("http://localhost:5000/weathersession", { method: "POST", headers: {"Content-Type":"application/json"}, credentials: "include", body: JSON.stringify({citysessionback: alldata2}) }) let temporary = await arrback.json() changedata(temporary) console.log(dataafterclick) } catch(err) { console.log(err) } } return<>
function1(e)} type="text" placeholder="Enter city (e.g. London)" />
